---
name: Feature or format request
about: Suggest a feature or a new conversion (please read how requests are triaged first)
labels: enhancement
---

<!--
ConvertIA's scope is deliberately bounded by ONE canonical inclusion test:
"Would a normal person plausibly want this conversion?" — inclusion is earned by everyday
demand, not by being technically possible.
(see SINGLE-SOURCE-OF-TRUTH.md -> What It Converts / Out of Scope).

New feature and format requests DEFAULT to "Future Ideas (Parked)": they are recorded, but only the
canonical inclusion test promotes one into a release. Exotic / specialist / forensic formats stay
parked. This keeps ConvertIA simple for the everyday person.
-->

**What would you like?**
<!-- The conversion or feature, and the everyday use case behind it. -->

**Why would a normal (non-specialist) person want this?**
<!-- This is the canonical inclusion test. A specialist-only request stays parked. -->

- [ ] I understand this request defaults to **Future Ideas (Parked)** unless it passes the canonical inclusion test.
